title: Pessamal  Lyrics Mounam Sollum Varthaigal
stanzas:
<div>
<div>
Pessamal  Lyrics Mounam Sollum Varthaigal Album

Pesaamal undhan mounam
enthan nenjile
kadhal valaiyai
veesi selgirathe.

pookkaatho undhan mounam
ennai kaanum velaiyil
kadhal vaasam
engum  veesumadaa.

nadhiye kadalil seraadhe
ennul kalandhu vidu.
mazhaiye mannai seraadhe
nenjil nirandhuvidu.

Pesaamal undhan mounam
enthan nenjile
kadhal valaiyai
veesi selgirathe.

pookkaatho undhan mounam
ennai kaanum velaiyil
kadhal vaasam
engum  veesumadaa.

paakkaamal ennai neeyum
thaandi sellum velai
paarthene undhan kannil
ennai thallum podhai. (2)

pada pada padavena
maarum vaanam
pattena neeyum paarthal.
en vaaname neeyadaa
neeye neeye thaanadaa

silu silu silunu
veesum kaatru
siridhaai neeyum siriththaai.
en vaazhakaiye neeyadaa
neeye neeye thaanadaa

Pesaamal.. Pesaamal..
Pesaamal undhan mounam
enthan nenjile
kadhal valaiyai
veesi selgirathe.

pookkaatho undhan mounam
ennai kaanum velaiyil
kadhal vaasam
engum  veesumadaa.

pesaatha undhan kannil
ennai kaanum velai.
thaanaaga aavaeno
unnal naanum oomai(2)

vizhiye vizhiye kadhal vizhiye
ennai orumurai paarthaal
vaanilai maarume
vaanil villum thondrume.

kaviye kaviye aanami kaviye
ennai orumurai paarthaal
pudhu thaaiyuru raagame
paadal paada thondrume.

Pesaamal undhan mounam
enthan nenjile
kadhal valaiyai
veesi selgirathe.

pookkaatho undhan mounam
ennai kaanum velaiyil
kadhal vaasam
engum  veesumadaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pessamal?

The song Pessamal explores themes of love and unexpressed feelings, conveying deep emotional connections.

In which movie does the song Pessamal appear?

The movie for the song Pessamal is currently unknown.

Who is the singer of Pessamal?

The singer for Pessamal is not specified.

When was Pessamal released?

Pessamal was released on February 11, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Pessamal beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and longing, making it a poignant addition to any romantic playlist. Its lyrics delve into the nuances of unexpressed emotions, creating a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The melody evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, perfect for moments of reflection. Overall, it serves as a heartfelt reminder of the power of love and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pessamal is a beautifully crafted melody that resonates with the depths of love and longing. The song captures the essence of unspoken emotions, making it a perfect companion for romantic moments. With its soothing lyrics and heartfelt delivery, it stands out as a gem in the Tamil music landscape.
stanzaMeanings: Your silence is weaving the net of love in my heart.
Your silence is like a flower, spreading the fragrance of love everywhere I see.
Oh river, don't mix with the sea. Oh rain, don't drown my heart.
Your silence is weaving the net of love in my heart.
Your silence is like a flower, spreading the fragrance of love everywhere I see.
Without seeing, I looked at you and saw your eyes pushing me away.
If I sing, the sky will change. Is it you who is my sky?
The gentle breeze blows softly, and you smile. Are you my life?
Your silence... Your silence... Your silence is weaving the net of love in my heart.
Your silence is like a flower, spreading the fragrance of love everywhere I see.
Without speaking, I see you in my eyes. Is it possible that I am silent because of you?
If you look into my eyes, love will change the sky and the clouds will appear.
Oh poet, if you look at me, a new melody will start to sing.
Your silence is weaving the net of love in my heart.
Your silence is like a flower, spreading the fragrance of love everywhere I see.
